summary: connect-cockpit v1.1 · refactor registry-driven. Per-platform specs (required fields, where-to-find, server fallback) externalized to connectors.json registry. SKILL.md now platform-agnostic loop. Adding a new source (Klaviyo, Pinterest, X Ads, etc.) = 1 entry in connectors.json, no SKILL.md edit. Cockpit-side: GOOGLE_DEVELOPER_TOKEN + GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID + GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET fall back to process.env if absent from payload (Abyss app-level). Operator now provides only customer_id + refresh_token for Google Ads. Snap notes corrected: self-serve via DB encrypted credentials, no Vercel redeploy.
